word: H5208 - נִיחֹוחַ - nîychôwach - nee-kho'-akh - Sweet odour

sections.paragraph:
Original: ניחח ניחוח

Transliteration: nı̂ychôach nı̂ychôach

Phonetic: nee-kho'-akh

BDB Definition:

  1. soothing, tranquillising

Origin: corresponding to H5207

TWOT entry: 2862

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
